description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits significant distortion and necrosis. Margins are highly irregular and curled downwards. Texture appears brittle and desiccated in affected areas. Some areas retain a greenish hue, indicating incomplete tissue breakdown."} {"description": "Lesions are characterized by a dark brown to black, necrotic appearance. They are irregular in shape and size, with a tendency to coalesce. Some lesions exhibit a slightly raised, textured surface, potentially indicating fungal sporulation. A chlorotic halo is present around some of the necrotic areas."} Lesions are not uniformly distributed; they appear concentrated along the leaf margins and extending inwards. The distal portion of the leaf is more severely affected than the proximal portion. There is a gradient of symptom severity from the base to the tip.
